case_title: S & S TRUCKING VS ABBETT ELECTRIC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-14-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABBETT ELECTRIC
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S & S TRUCKING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ABBETT ELECTRIC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF S & S TRUCKING HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,939.60 FILED BY S & S TRUCKING AS TO DEFENDANT ABBETT ELECTRIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S & S TRUCKING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABBETT ELECTRIC $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00, PLTF TO EXECUTE LIEN RELEASE PROVIDED BY DEFT AS CONDITION TO PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-19-1993, GRANTED
